description: Traveling Ionospheric Disturbance (TID) events detected via cross-path correlation of band-passed timing residuals.  One row per event produced by TIDDetector.detect_tid().

fields.name: timestamp_utc
fields.description: Event start time (ISO 8601 UTC) -- the moment the detector saw the significant correlation

fields.name: minute_boundary_utc
fields.description: Unix epoch timestamp of the fusion-cycle minute boundary that produced this event

fields.name: event_id
fields.description: Unique event identifier (YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS_<n_paths>); stable across re-reads

fields.name: period_minutes
fields.description: Dominant period of the band-passed residual signature, MSTID (10-30 min) or LSTID (30-90 min)

fields.name: amplitude_ms
fields.description: RMS amplitude of the band-passed residual on the strongest path (passes min_amplitude_ms gate)

fields.name: velocity_m_s
fields.description: Horizontal propagation velocity from TDOA solve or 2-path geometry fallback.  NaN when the detector could not resolve a velocity.

fields.name: direction_deg
fields.description: Azimuth of propagation, 0 = north, 90 = east.  NaN when the detector could not resolve a direction.

fields.name: correlation_coefficient
fields.description: Strongest per-lag Pearson r found across all path pairs (P-H31)

fields.name: significance_p
fields.description: Bonferroni-corrected p-value of the strongest correlation (P-H32).  Detections require p < significance_alpha (typically 0.01).

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: 1 - significance_p, treated as the detector's reported confidence (P-M26 replaces an ad-hoc correlation x 1.2)

fields.name: n_paths_correlated
fields.description: Number of (station, frequency_mhz) paths whose band-passed residuals contributed to the detection

fields.name: leading_path
fields.description: Path that saw the disturbance first (format: 'STATION_FREQ_MHZ', e.g. 'WWV_10.0')

fields.name: lagging_path
fields.description: Path that saw the disturbance last

fields.name: lag_minutes
fields.description: Time delay between leading_path and lagging_path detections

quality_flags.GOOD: significance_p < 0.001 AND n_paths_correlated >= 3 AND velocity/direction resolved (non-NaN)
quality_flags.MARGINAL: 0.001 <= significance_p < 0.01 OR n_paths_correlated < 3 OR velocity/direction unresolved
quality_flags.BAD: significance_p >= 0.01 (does not clear the detector's threshold; events at this level should not have been written)
quality_flags.MISSING: No TID record for the queried window

history: 1.0.0 (2026-05-20): initial release; wires P-H29 -- the TIDDetector statistical engine (P-H30..P-H33 + P-M26) is now backed by a real L3 data product.
